title: Metal-Organic Cages (MOC) Synthesis Process Schema
description: A comprehensive JSON schema representing the synthesis process of Metal-Organic Cages (MOCs), including reactants, process parameters, characterization, and host-guest properties.

cage_identity.description: The identity and structural details of the Metal-Organic Cage (MOC) being synthesized.

moc_type.description: The type of Metal-Organic Cage (MOC) being synthesized, defined by its chemical formula and stoichiometry.

metal_ions.description: Array of metal ions used in the synthesis. Each entry should include the metal symbol, oxidation state, and source (e.g., salt).

symbol.description: The chemical symbol of the metal ion (e.g., 'Fe', 'Cu').

oxidation_state.description: The oxidation state of the metal ion (e.g., +2, +3).

source.description: The source of the metal ion, typically a salt (e.g., 'FeCl3', 'Cu(NO3)2').

ligands.description: Array of ligands used in the synthesis. Each entry should include the ligand name, formula, and source (e.g., commercially purchased or pre-synthesized).

name.description: The name of the ligand as appears in the text (e.g., 'H2Bpy', 'TCPP').

formula.description: The chemical formula of the ligand (e.g., 'C10H8N2', 'C8H4N4O4').

source.description: The source of the ligand, indicating whether it is commercially available or pre-synthesized (e.g., 'Commercial', 'Pre-synthesized', 'In-situ').

counter_ions.description: Array of counter ions used for charge balancing. Each entry should include the counter ion name and formula.

name.description: The name of the counter ion (e.g., 'Cl-', 'PF6-').

stoichiometry.description: The absolute stoichiometric ratios of metal ions, ligands, and counter ions in the MOC.

metal_to_ligand.description: The absolute ratio of metal ions to ligands (e.g., '8:16').

cage_to_counter_ion.description: The absolute ratio of cage complexes to counter ions (e.g., '1:2').

topology.description: The topological type of the MOC (e.g., 'hexagonal prism', 'truncated tetrahedron', 'cube', 'octanuclear cuneane', 'pentagonal prism', 'trigonal prism', 'bicapped square antiprism', 'gyrobifastigium','square orthobicupola').

coordination_geometry.description: The coordination geometry of the metal ions in the MOC (e.g., 'octahedral', 'tetrahedral','square planar').

synthesis_procedure.description: The protocol for synthesising the MOC, including chemical components, process parameters, and reaction details.

chemical_components.description: The chemical components used in the synthesis, including metal sources, ligands, counter ion sources, and other components.

metal_sources.description: Array of metal ion sources (salts) used in the synthesis.

name.description: The name of the metal salt (e.g., 'FeCl3', 'Cu(NO3)2').

concentration.description: The concentration of the metal salt in the solution (e.g., molarity).

synthesis_details.description: Details of the synthesis or purification of the metal source if it is not commercially available.

method.description: The method used to synthesize or purify the metal source (e.g., 'precipitation','recrystallization', 'ion exchange').

yield.description: The yield of the metal source synthesis or purification as a percentage.

ligands.description: Array of ligands used in the synthesis, including their names, concentrations, and units.

concentration.description: The concentration of the ligand in the solution (e.g., molarity).

synthesis_details.description: Details of the synthesis of the ligand if it is not commercially available.

method.description: The method used to synthesize the ligand (e.g., 'condensation','reduction','substitution').

yield.description: The yield of the ligand synthesis as a percentage.

counter_ion_sources.description: Array of counter ion sources used for charge balancing.

name.description: The name of the counter ion source (e.g., 'NaCl', 'NH4PF6').

concentration.description: The concentration of the counter ion source in the solution (e.g., molarity).

other_components.description: Array of other components used in the synthesis.

name.description: The name of the other component (e.g., 'HCl', 'NaOH').

concentration.description: The concentration of the other component in the solution (e.g., molarity).

process_parameters.description: The process parameters and steps involved in the synthesis of the MOC, including solvent, temperature, pressure, atmosphere, and time.

solvent.description: The solvent used in the synthesis, including its name, volume, and type.

volume.description: The volume of the solvent used in the synthesis (e.g., liters).

type.description: The type of solvent (e.g., 'polar aprotic', 'polar protic', 'non-polar').

temperature.description: The temperature conditions during the synthesis.

pressure.description: The pressure conditions during the synthesis.

atmosphere.description: The atmospheric conditions during the synthesis (e.g., 'air', 'inert gas', 'N2').

time.description: The duration of each step in the synthesis process.

duration.description: The duration of the process step (e.g., hours, minutes).

steps.description: The sequence of steps involved in the synthesis process. Each step includes actions like mixing, heating, cooling, or filtration.

action.description: The action performed in the step (e.g.,'mix', 'heat', 'cool', 'filter', 'evaporate','sonicate', 'centrifuge', 'dry').

temperature.description: The temperature conditions for this specific step.

duration.description: The duration of the step (e.g., hours, minutes).

reaction_details.description: Additional details about the reaction, including scale, yield, and purification methods.

scale.description: The scale of the reaction, including the amount of metal ions used and the volume of the solvent.

metal_amount.description: The amount of metal ions used in the reaction (e.g., in millimoles).

solvent_volume.description: The volume of the solvent used in the reaction (e.g., in liters).

yield.description: The yield of the MOC synthesis as a percentage.

purification_method.description: The method used to purify the synthesized MOC (e.g., 'filtration','recrystallization', 'chromatography', 'crystallisation', etc).

characterisation.description: The methods and results used to characterise the synthesised MOC.

methods.description: Array of characterisation methods used (e.g., NMR, mass-spectroscopy, PXRD, IR, DOSY).

name.description: The name of the characterisation method (e.g., 'NMR', 'PXRD').

results.description: The results obtained from the characterisation methods.

nmr.description: NMR spectroscopy results, including chemical shifts and integration values.

chemical_shifts.description: Array of chemical shift values in ppm.

integration_values.description: Array of integration values corresponding to the chemical shifts.

mass_spectrometry.description: Mass spectrometry results, including m/z values and intensities.

intensities.description: Array of intensities corresponding to the m/z values.

pxrd.description: Powder X-ray diffraction results, including 2θ values and intensities.

intensities.description: Array of intensities corresponding to the 2θ values.

ir.description: Infrared spectroscopy results, including wavenumber values and intensities.

wavenumbers.description: Array of wavenumber values in cm^-1.

intensities.description: Array of intensities corresponding to the wavenumbers.

dosy.description: Diffusion-ordered spectroscopy results, including diffusion coefficients and temperatures.

diffusion_coefficients.description: Array of diffusion coefficients in m^2/s.

temperatures.description: Array of temperatures in Kelvin at which measurements were taken.

others.description: Other characterization methods and their results.

method.description: The name of the other characterization method.

results.description: The results obtained from the other characterization method.

host_guest_properties.description: The host-guest properties and applications of the synthesized MOC, including the types of guests trapped and their properties.

guests.description: Array of guests trapped within the MOC. Each entry includes the guest name, type, and properties.

name.description: The name of the guest molecule (e.g., 'CO2', 'H2O', 'N2').

properties.description: Properties of the guest, such as solubility, diffusion rate, or binding affinity.

solubility.description: The solubility of the guest in the MOC (e.g., mol/L).

diffusion_rate.description: The diffusion rate of the guest within the MOC (e.g., m^2/s).

binding_affinity.description: The binding affinity of the guest to the MOC (e.g., kJ/mol).

properties.description: Additional properties of the MOC, such as stability, conductivity, and adsorption capacity.

stability.description: The stability of the MOC under various conditions.

thermal_stability.description: The temperature at which the MOC starts to decompose (e.g., in Celsius).

chemical_stability.description: The chemical stability of the MOC, indicating its resistance to acids, bases, or other chemicals (e.g.,'stable in pH 1-14', 'degrades in strong acids').

conductivity.description: The electrical conductivity of the MOC.

value.description: The conductivity value in Siemens per meter (S/m).

adsorption_capacity.description: The surface coverage of the MOC for specific guests.

capacity.description: The surface coverage of the MOC for specific guests in m^2/ g.

other_properties.description: Other properties of the MOC that do not fit into the above categories but are relevant to its characterisation and functionality.

cavity_size.description: The size of the cavity within the MOC (e.g., in angstroms).

chiroptical_properties.description: Chiroptical properties of the MOC, including circular dichroism (CD) and circularly polarized luminescence (CPL).

circular_dichroism.description: Circular dichroism (CD) spectrum data, including wavelengths and intensities.

applications.description: Array of applications for the synthesized MOC, such as gas storage, catalysis, or drug delivery.

application_type.description: The type of application (e.g., 'gas storage', 'catalysis', 'transaport','bioimaging, other).

description.description: A detailed description of how the MOC is used in this application and its performance.
